Class ClassWellDefinedness

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd.WellDefinednessCheck
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd.ClassWellDefinedness
All Implemented Interfaces:
Contract, SpecificationElement
public final class ClassWellDefinedness extends WellDefinednessCheck
A contract for checking the well-definedness of a specification for a class invariant.

    • map

      public ClassWellDefinedness map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface Contract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Specified by:
      map in class WellDefinednessCheck
      Parameters:

      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • createInvTaclet

      public static ImmutableSet<RewriteTaclet> createInvTaclet(Services services)
      Creates a well-definedness taclet for an invariant reference. Actually we should be able to statically denote this taclet in the rule folder, but somehow the type java.lang.Object is not available there in the required manner.
      Parameters:
      services -
      Returns:
      the well-definedness taclet for an invariant reference

      public boolean modelField()
      Description copied from class: WellDefinednessCheck

      Returns:

    • combine

      public ClassWellDefinedness combine(WellDefinednessCheck wdc, TermServices services)
      Description copied from class: WellDefinednessCheck
      Combines two well-definedness checks having the same name, id, target, type, behaviour and are either both model fields or both not a model field.
      Overrides:
      combine in class WellDefinednessCheck
      Parameters:
      wdc - the well-definedness check to be combined with the current one
      services -
      Returns:
